description_long: This is a stylized doll with a blocky, articulated body and exaggerated proportions, featuring long, wavy black hair styled in twin ponytails and held back by a wide, pale pink headband. The doll's face is expressive, with a wide open-mouthed smile and closed, crescent-shaped eyes, giving it a joyful and playful appearance. It is dressed in a sleeveless, leopard-print top with a pink and brown color palette, and matching shorts, evoking a trendy, urban fashion sense. The arms and legs are simple and cylindrical, with rounded hands and feet, typical of modern collectible dolls. The surface appears smooth and slightly glossy, suggesting a plastic construction. This doll would likely be found in urban play areas, parks, or as part of a child's toy collection in a city environment.
description: A playful, blocky doll with long black twin ponytails, a pink headband, and a leopard-print outfit, featuring a wide smiling face and smooth plastic finish.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the long, wavy black hair in twin ponytails and the back of the leopard-print outfit.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the hair's volume, the pink headband, and the side profile of the doll's face and outfit.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the doll's expressive smiling face, pink headband, and full details of the leopard-print top and shorts.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the hair's flow, the headband, and the side of the doll's face and clothing.
attribute_clothing_style: Sleeveless leopard-print top and matching shorts in pink and brown tones, reflecting a trendy, urban-inspired fashion style.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with both arms slightly bent and extended outward, legs straight and parallel, head facing forward.
attribute_facial_expression: Smiling with a wide open mouth, closed crescent-shaped eyes, and no visible eyebrows, conveying a joyful and playful emotion.
attribute_hair_style: Long, wavy black hair styled in twin ponytails, secured with a wide pale pink headband.
